title: Legacy ERP to Cloud Migration for RetailCo
pain_points: Siloed data between ERP and CRM
solution_summary: Implemented API-led connectivity using MuleSoft to bridge SAP and Salesforce. Created a real-time data sync pipeline with event-driven triggers. Migrated batch FTP processes to REST API calls with error handling and retry logic.
outcomes: Reporting time reduced from 2 days to 15 minutes
